code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut start = -1
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if start >= 0
      let word = string.substring(input, start, i)
      if word == "next"
        count = count + 1
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let word = string.substring(input, start, n)
  if word == "next"
    count = count + 1
  end
end

let final = count % 3
match final
when 0
  println("Red")
when 1
  println("Green")
when _
  println("Yellow")
end
